cmsConfig.heroTitle: Designs of Dreams — Heritage & Couture Atelier
cmsConfig.heroSubtitle: Hand-woven luxury ethnic wear preserving the royal weaves of India.
cmsConfig.announcementText: Atelier Booking Alert: Virtual consultations are open.

gallery.title: Detail & Thread
gallery.desc: Finely spun gold threads embroidered onto heavy velvet base fabric.

gallery.title: The Master Weaver
gallery.desc: Varanasi master weaver hand-weaving mulberry silk over weeks of dedicated labor.

gallery.title: Zardozi Handwork
gallery.desc: Detailed shadow embroidery and metal wire applique from Lucknow on georgette.

gallery.title: Heritage Spools
gallery.desc: Premium colored silk threads prepared on traditional reels, ready for looms.

gallery.title: Draping Elegance
gallery.desc: Mulberry silk saree exhibiting detailed pure silver zari brocade work.

gallery.title: Indigo Dye Vat
gallery.desc: Traditional hand-dyeing processes using pure organic botanical indigo vats.

gallery.title: The Crimson Silk
gallery.desc: Crimson hand-dyed organic silk threads drying in the afternoon sun.

gallery.title: Craft Dyeing Vat
gallery.desc: Botanical ingredients creating natural organic coloring solutions for yarn.

gallery.title: Block Print Matrix
gallery.desc: Hand-carved seasoned teak wood block matrices used for printing intricate motifs.

gallery.title: Gold Zari Skeins
gallery.desc: Fine silver wire bundles electroplated with pure gold ready to be woven into borders.

gallery.title: The Finishing Touch
gallery.desc: Meticulous quality inspection and thread trimming on finished sarees before packing.

gallery.title: Loom Drafting
gallery.desc: Traditional card drafting and loom-harness mapping for floral zari grids.

cmsConfig.footerBio: Designs of Dreams is a curated marketplace celebrating premium Indian heritage textiles.
cmsConfig.seoTitle: Designs of Dreams — Luxury Indian Ethnic Wear
cmsConfig.seoDescription: Discover hand-woven Kanjeevarams, Patan Patolas, and zardozi blouses.
